Patch Set 2:

hm, this is an api change of sorts, what other users of this file are there and how would they be affected?

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> hm, this is an api change of sorts, what other users of this file are there and how would they be affected?

If user is using shell utils such as grep/awk, they won't be affected because only some new lines are added and can be simply ignored by old programs.
If user is using YAML to parse the file, they only need to care about the new format because the old format is not compatible to YAML.

Patch Set 2:

The only exception is the program which parses rename_stats in YAML after commit e96cb6ff1fe and reads these data: snapshot_time/start_time/elapsed_time.

This patch is merged in Sep 2022 in fs/master.

commit.subject: LU-16523 lprocfs: adjust the format of rename_stats
commit.message:
LU-16523 lprocfs: adjust the format of rename_stats

Adjust the format of rename_stats to a more human-friendly YAML.

Fixes: bedb797c5d ("LU-16110 lprocfs: make job_stats and rename_stats valid YAML")
Signed-off-by: Lei Feng <flei@whamcloud.com>
Test-Parameters: trivial
Change-Id: I20e6d07c974e907bb2e30412dd1899f845de2021
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/49869
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
